scripts.build: vite build && cp src/background.js src/content.js src/main.js src/offscreen.html manifest.json src/content.css dist/ && cp -r _locales dist/ && cp icons/loading.gif icons/icon16.png icons/icon48.png icons/icon128.png dist/ && cp node_modules/onnxruntime-web/dist/ort-wasm-simd-threaded.jsep.wasm node_modules/onnxruntime-web/dist/ort-wasm-simd-threaded.jsep.mjs dist/
scripts.dist: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run package
